description_long: This object is a compact, double-barreled shotgun with a rugged, utilitarian design. The barrels are arranged side-by-side and are finished in a matte black, showing some wear and subtle texturing. The receiver and trigger assembly are also black, with a slightly angular, industrial look. The stock is short and appears to be made of a rough, unfinished wood or synthetic material, giving it a makeshift or tactical appearance. The trigger guard is elongated and angular, providing ample space for gloved fingers. Overall, the shotgun has a robust, functional aesthetic suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, side-by-side double-barreled shotgun with a rugged black metal body and a short, rough-textured stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, with both barrels, the angular receiver, and the short, rough stock clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the twin barrel openings and the narrow profile of the receiver and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the barrels, receiver, and stock visible from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the stock and the alignment of the barrels, with the trigger guard faintly visible below.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, barrels of equal length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, angular trigger guard with a squared profile and ample finger space
